hero.title: A space that understands you -- before you speak.
hero.subtitle: An intelligence kernel that lives entirely on the edge. So every place you are, truly knows you.

era.title: Compute is coming back to you.
era.subtitle: For a decade we handed everything to the cloud. The next decade brings the most personal part back under your own roof.
era.col1Body: Inference returns to a place you can see, a plug you can pull.
era.col2Body: Before you speak, it is already watching, listening, preparing.
era.col3Body: An intelligence grown for you, your family, your space -- no one else.

spectrum.title: From a bedside lamp, to a city block.
spectrum.subtitle: One kernel, many scales. Wherever you are, intelligence centers on you.
spectrum.bedsideBody: The first light, that understands your night.
spectrum.deskBody: The room prepared, before the thought arrives.
spectrum.homeBody: A house that understands the people living in it.
spectrum.communityBody: A building, a street -- looking out for each other, without looking in.

intelligence.title: Not reaction. Understanding.
intelligence.subtitle: Real intelligence is not about what it can answer. It is that it already knows you.
intelligence.card1Body: It sees you walk into the room, before you speak.
intelligence.card2Body: It remembers how you turned off the lights last night.
intelligence.card3Body: It knows why, not just what.
intelligence.card4Body: One intent, the whole room responds.
intelligence.cta: Meet the intelligence that is yours

vision.title: The next computing platform isn't in your pocket. It's in the room.
vision.body: Phones are personal AI. The space is the new platform we are building. Starts from sensing. Finishes on-device. Gives every room an intelligence kernel of its own.

platform.title: Seven years of engineering, one foundation.
platform.subtitle: Every heartbeat, computed locally.
platform.sensingBody: Vision . IR . mmWave . Audio . Environment -- five-source fusion
platform.edgeBody: Event to response in 50 ms. Real-time on low-power silicon.
platform.memoryBody: L0 Static . L1 Dynamic . L2 Habit . L3 Semantic
platform.protocolsBody: Matter 1.3 . Home Assistant . MCP . MQTT . XunProto
platform.privacyBody: Four-layer network lock . Offline-capable . Data stays home

trust.title: Every decision, written to the hash-chain.
trust.body: Append-only ledger, tamper-evident. Full control-point mapping to MLPS 2.0 / HIPAA / GDPR. RBAC four-role x multi-site tiered authorisation. Ready for regulators and families, any time.

cta.title: Bring the thinking space into the next decade.

hero.title: Yours. Only yours.
hero.subtitle: Your habits, your rhythm, your home -- understood, never shared.

memory.title: Your Own Memory
memory.body: Preferences, habits, rhythms -- all modeled locally. This memory belongs to you alone. Never merged, never uploaded, never trained on.

personalization.title: Personalized Setup
personalization.body: A separate profile per family member. Grandparents' routines, kids' schedules, your commute -- never crossing, never interrupting.

learning.title: Adaptive Learning
learning.body: 30-day adaptive modeling. From the first light, the first cup of water -- it grows into you. No setup, no training.

orchestra.title: Cross-Device Orchestra
orchestra.body: Brand-agnostic, protocol-agnostic. One phrase, one gesture, one intent -- the whole home answers like an orchestra, not a wall of switches.

anticipatory.title: Anticipatory
anticipatory.body: Alerts that arrive before the incident. Care that arrives before the call. A fall can be caught early. A need can be met early.

privacy.title: Privacy Shield
privacy.body: Four-layer network lock plus default-zero egress allowlist. Faces, vitals, room video -- raw data never leaves your home.

offline.title: Offline-Capable
offline.body: If the network drops, the lights still turn on, the doors still lock, the alarm still reaches help. Critical capabilities always run locally.

household.title: Household Intelligence
household.body: One family, one memory. Shareable with loved ones, hideable from guests, passable to the next generation when elders are gone.

cta.title: Bring this intelligence into your space.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: One kernel, many scales. From a single bed to a city block -- already deployed in real spaces.

health.title: Health & Care
health.body: The heaviest watch, the lightest presence.

home.title: Home & Living
home.body: A house that understands the family. A family that worries less.

commercial.title: Commercial Spaces
commercial.body: Hotels, offices, retail -- spaces that learn to host.

public.title: Education & Public
public.body: Campuses and cultural venues -- care at larger scale.

elderlyCare.title: Elderly Care
elderlyCare.brief: Falls, prolonged lying, bed-leaving, night patrol

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.brief: Rooms that move from buttons to understanding guests

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.brief: Meeting rooms that know the next step

retail.title: Retail Space
retail.brief: Shelves that see, spaces that read the flow

campus.title: Campus
campus.brief: Ambient intelligence for classrooms and dorms

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Three SKUs from home to enterprise. Hardware plus subscription plus profile content.

homeBox.name: Home Box
homeBox.desc: Edge AI box for households. RK3588 + 16G RAM + 256G eMMC.
homeBox.bullet1: Works out of the box, onboarding in 2 hours

communityKit.name: Community Kit
communityKit.desc: Pre-configured gateway for communities of 20 to 200 units. x86 J4125 + 32G + 1T.

enterpriseStack.name: Enterprise Stack
enterpriseStack.desc: On-prem deployment for top hospitals, specialty clinics and large care facilities. Jetson Orin + custom integration.

trust.title: Trust & Compliance
trust.subtitle: Local-First is not a slogan. It is a four-layer network lock, hash-chain audit, tiered RBAC and compliance mapping.

localFirst.title: Local-First
localFirst.body: Four-layer network lock at Application / Audit / Container / Host iptables. Zero exceptions offline, zero outbound enterprise allowlist.

auditChain.title: Hash-Chain Audit
auditChain.body: Every LLM inference, every execution, every rule change is written to an append-only, tamper-evident AuditLedger with direct report export.

rbac.title: Multi-Role RBAC
rbac.body: admin / operator / observer / user plus multi-site principal with extra_sites. Floor-level isolation for institutions.

compliance.title: Compliance Mapping
compliance.body: Full control-point mapping for MLPS 2.0 Level 3, HIPAA-like, GDPR-like. Audit logs export as JSONL, CSV, or PDF.

manifesto.title: Bringing inference back to you.
manifesto.p1: For the last decade we handed more and more to the cloud. It amplified what we could do, and quietly took some things with it -- our latency, our privacy, our sense of how these systems actually work.
manifesto.p2: We think the part of intelligence closest to you should stay close -- on a device you can see, in a place you can unplug. It won't always be the fastest option, but it should be the one you trust.
manifesto.p3: What SidebyStar is building is more than a product. It is a foundation we hope others can build on, so that ambient intelligence can grow naturally in every home, clinic and community.
manifesto.predictions: Three things we think will happen
manifesto.pred1: Every home will have a local intelligence hub, the way every home today has a router.
manifesto.pred2: Being traceable and auditable will become a baseline expectation of AI -- the way HTTPS is today.
manifesto.pred3: More collaboration between devices will happen locally, instead of routing through the cloud.

frontiers.title: What we're researching
frontiers.subtitle: What we've shipped, what is in the lab, and what we hope becomes a standard by 2030.

jepa.title: Visual models that can anticipate
jepa.body: Not only seeing what is happening, but sensing what might happen -- so that an alert can arrive before an incident.

causal.title: Memory that understands causes
causal.body: Going beyond event logs. We record why something happened, and how to avoid it next time.

endSideLlm.title: Small, strong, on-device models
endSideLlm.body: Lightweight language models running directly on local hardware -- a 'home brain' of your own.

zkAudit.title: Zero-knowledge audit
zkAudit.body: Let users prove they are compliant to regulators, without handing over a single line of raw data.

fedBundle.title: A network that shares experience
fedBundle.body: What one facility learns can help another -- shared as signed experience, not as personal data.

roadmap.title: Roadmap 2026 - 2030
roadmap.subtitle: Each step comes with a milestone you can verify.
roadmap.y2026: Stable local fact base and complete audit trail
roadmap.y2027: On-device visual world models and cross-facility experience sharing
roadmap.y2028: Open home-brain interfaces, inviting a wider developer community
roadmap.y2029: A next-generation protocol for devices from different brands
roadmap.y2030: Helping local AI and zero-knowledge audit move toward industry standards

developers.title: Developers & integration
developers.subtitle: Stable APIs, a plugin ecosystem, open source kernel -- for developers and systems integrators.

cases.title: Cases
cases.subtitle: Validated deployments in real-world scenarios. Every data point ships with time, scale and measurement method.

pilot.title: Apply for Pilot
pilot.subtitle: A 2 to 4 week pilot for a single room or floor. Validate, then scale.
